race.description: Country Music Raceday On Sale Now Mdn Plate
race.comment: SECRET FENKEL (7) is unlucky to still be a maiden hitting the top-four at his past five outings and strikes a very winnable contest here. Has placed around this circuit, rock-hard fit and maps ideally for this from gate three. Ticks a few boxes for a race like this. BENZINO (1) has had a few chances but has been right there at the past couple of efforts and looks to be working up to a maiden victory. Looms as the main danger. HOPEFUL CAUSE (4) hit the frame for the first time last start and appears to be improving with racing. In the mix. BLUE POLES (10) gets Melbourne Cup-winning rider Dolan in the saddle which is significant over this staying journey. Respect any market confidence. CLENCH (2) best of the rest despite the sticky draw.
